```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?country ?countryLabel ?numMembers WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P463 wd:Q142 .
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = 'en')
  .
  {
    ?country wdt:P120 ?parliament .
    ?parliament wdt:P2046 ?numMembers .
  } UNION {
    ?country wdt:P120 ?parliament .
    ?parliament wdt:P1159 ?chamber .
    ?chamber wdt:P31 wd:Q2535417 .
    ?chamber wdt:P2046 ?numMembers .
  }
}
```
